boundary: Audit only. It does not mine, call models, promote reviewed-core rows, add ObscureAI cases, or deploy.

layers.name: candidate_materialization
layers.note: Materializes non-self mined rows as review candidates; no model call.

layers.name: first_pass_candidate_review
layers.note: Rule-based triage only; not reviewed-core promotion.

layers.name: direct_source_review
layers.note: Current queue is closed; future new rows need source interpretation unless deterministic rules close them first.

layers.name: translation_hold_board
layers.note: Board creation is free; downstream translation-source review is separately tracked before any promotion.

layers.name: hardening_named-url-extraction
layers.note: Bounded source-review aid; not reviewed-core promotion.

layers.name: hardening_translation-source-review
layers.note: Bounded source-review aid; not reviewed-core promotion.

layers.name: bulk_bulk_translation_review
layers.note: Bulk semantic lanes are already drained; rollup itself is local.

layers.name: bulk_parent_source_extraction
layers.note: Bulk semantic lanes are already drained; rollup itself is local.

layers.name: bulk_translation_parent_source_extraction
layers.note: Bulk semantic lanes are already drained; rollup itself is local.

layers.name: source_review_promotion_hardening
layers.note: Classifies reviewed source surfaces into bounded promotion gates.

layers.name: source_review_completion_ledger
layers.note: Closes the source-reviewed layer without adding reviewed-core or ObscureAI rows.

layers.name: reviewed_core_promotion_packet
layers.note: Builds bounded source-linked packet; no promotion by itself.

layers.name: case_extraction_rollup
layers.note: Current case extraction is complete; future clusters may need semantic extraction lanes.

layers.name: case_hardening_review
layers.note: Fetches/checks public sources and drafts bounded claims; human acceptance remains the boundary.

layers.name: case_autoreview
layers.note: Creates deterministic final recommendations/draft adjudication; never calls an LLM.
